name: Hot and Spicy Beef Back Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place each slab of ribs, meat side down, in the center of a double thick rectangle of heavy aluminum foil.
2. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons water over the rib bones.
3. Fold two opposite sides of the foil together to cover the ribs.
4. Fold the edges over 3 to 4 times, pressing creases tightly each time, leaving some air space.
5. Flatten the foil at one end and fold into a triangle shape, folding several times toward the package and pressing tightly to seal.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 on the other end of the ribs.
7. Place packets on the grill directly over low to medium coals.
8. Cook for 1 1/2 hours, turning packets every half hour.
9. Meanwhile, combine ketchup, remaining 1/4 cup water, lemon juice, ground cinnamon, hot pepper sauce, and crushed red pepper in a small saucepan.
10. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and cook slowly for 10 to 12 minutes.
11. Remove ribs from foil packets and place on the grill over medium coals.
12. Broil ribs for 30 to 40 minutes, turning occasionally and brushing with sauce.
13. Serve remaining sauce with ribs. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
